metadata.description:
This individual appears to be in their 30s and presents as male. Their skin is olive-toned with some visible pores and fine lines around the eyes. The face is oval with a defined jawline. Dark brown, tightly coiled, short curly hair frames the face, with a slightly receding hairline at the temples.

The eyes are almond-shaped and a striking amber-brown color, set moderately apart. Thick, dark, slightly arched eyebrows define the brow. The nose is straight with a broad bridge and a rounded tip. The mouth has medium-full lips with a gentle upward curve, forming a subtle smile. A short, dark, well-groomed beard and mustache cover the lower face. The overall impression suggests a blend of features often associated with Mediterranean or Middle Eastern descent. The head is angled slightly to the right, and the expression is pleasant and engaging.
metadata.anchor: Amber-brown eyes and tight dark curls.
